title: Senior Software Engineer - Naukri Digital Technologies - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Naukri Digital Technologies - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Naukri Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Naukri Digital Technologies:
Naukri Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri Digital Technologies!
